column1: id;name;source;type;tags;steps
TC-18J7UX;Creating a circular revision reference is rejected;https://docs.inventree.org/en/latest/part/revision/#revision-restrictions;negative;revisions
Given a user with part edit permission is logged in
When the user edits 'PCB Assembly' and sets the 'Revision Of' field to 'PCB Assembly' (itself)
When the user clicks 'Submit'
Then the system rejects the submission with an error indicating a part cannot be a revision of itself (circular reference)"
TC-T95IKX;Two revisions of the same part with duplicate revision codes are rejected;https://docs.inventree.org/en/latest/part/revision/#revision-restrictions;negative;revisions
column3: validation;"Given a part 'PCB Assembly' has an existing revision with revision code 'A'

column1: Given a user with part create permission is logged in
When the user creates a new part
When the user clicks 'Submit'
Then the system rejects the submission with an error indicating revision code 'A' already exists for 'PCB Assembly'"
TC-PG3UG4;Revision of a variant must reference the same template as the original variant;https://docs.inventree.org/en/latest/part/revision/#revision-restrictions;negative;revisions
column3: template;"Given 'Widget Template A' and 'Widget Template B' are two separate Template parts

column1: Given 'Widget-Red' is a variant of 'Widget Template A'
Given a user with part create permission is logged in
When the user creates a revision of 'Widget-Red' but changes the template reference to 'Widget Template B'
When the user clicks 'Submit'
Then the system rejects the submission with an error indicating the revision must reference the same template as the original part 'Widget Template A'"
TC-8LY4HU;Template part cannot have revisions;https://docs.inventree.org/en/latest/part/revision/#revision-restrictions;negative;revisions
column3: template;"Given a part 'Widget Template' is marked as a Template part

column1: Given a user with part create permission is logged in
When the user creates a new part and sets 'Revision Of' to 'Widget Template'
When the user clicks 'Submit'
Then the system rejects the submission with an error indicating template parts cannot have revisions"
TC-CIYEWH;Variant part is allowed to have revisions;https://docs.inventree.org/en/latest/part/revision/#revision-restrictions;positive;revisions
column3: template;"Given a part 'Widget-Red' is a variant of Template part 'Widget Template'

column1: Given a user with part create permission is logged in
When the user creates a new part
When the user clicks 'Submit'
Then the revision is successfully created and the new part shows 'Revision Of: Widget-Red' and 'Revision: B'"
